title: lathyrus filiformis var. ensifolius
intro: Lathyrus filiformis var. ensifolius, also known as the needle bean or needle pea, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve muscle cramps and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lathyrus filiformis var. ensifolius include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural remedy for menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
